arts.ttl: Arsenal fan gets three-year banning order for racial abuse of Thomas Partey
arts.sum: He said he mimicked as satire what white racist would say Defendant said to be ‘dumbfounded’ when police came An Arsenal fan has received a three-year football banning order after racially abusing Thomas Partey, despite claiming he was mimicking as satire what a white racist would say. Charles Ogunmilade, 28, previously admitted posting a “grossly offensive” message on X, attacking the midfielder for missing a chance during the 3-3 draw with Southampton on 21 April last year. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Theo Walcott shares the mistake he feels Mikel Arteta has already made with Ethan Nwaneri at Arsenal
The Erling Haaland Man City transfer theory that could have major impact on Arsenal
arts.sum: If no new contract is signed by the end of the 2024/25 season, with Haaland entering the final two years of his City deal, there will be more rumours and more talks around his future at the Etihad Stadium. Haaland does have a £150million release clause in his current contract and City are negotiating terms over a new deal and are thought to be keen to remove that clause to avoid giving Madrid an easy way to sign him - no matter how big the price is.

arts.ttl: “Priority” deal in the works at Arsenal, with Gunners “optimistic” over talks
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly working on a new contract for midfield wonderkid Ethan Nwaneri, with his future considered a priority for the Gunners, according to Fabrizio Romano. Posting on X this afternoon, Romano provided some insight into Arsenal’s work on tying Nwaneri down to a new deal, making it clear that the north London giants are […] The post “Priority” deal in the works at Arsenal, with Gunners “optimistic” over talks appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Been told': Arsenal and Tottenham both monitoring 'special' talent wanted across Europe - journalist
David Raya highlights Sporting CP's danger ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya has admitted one Sporting CP player in particular could cause problems for the Gunners in Champions League clash.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres Stats: Why Swedish superstar should be top of Arsenal's January wishlist
arts.sum: If you thought the international break would slow Viktor Gyokeres down, then you were certainly mistaken. Sweden have one of the most potent frontlines on the international stage, with Dejan Kulusevsk...

arts.ttl: David Raya reveals Arsenal plan for Viktor Gyokeres as Mikel Arteta sent five-word message
arts.sum: "We know his strengths, how he runs a lot in behind and scores a lot in one-v-one and he is a top player in form," said Raya, speaking to reporters at a press conference on Monday. He's enjoyed a brilliant vein of form in the Champions League too, netting a hat-trick against Manchester City earlier this month to maintain Portuguese club's unbeaten run.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as Mikel Arteta provides Declan Rice update before Sporting clash
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters, Arteta confirmed that the defender is going to be ruled out for 'months'. "We have Kieran Tierney after a long injury, it’s great news that he’s back," said Arteta.

arts.ttl: What Arsenal need to qualify for Champions League knockout stages amid play-off possibility
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta will be hoping his side can continue to kick-off following Saturday's 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest. A run of four league games without a win had placed the north Londoners' title chances in limbo.
